texts: At ZuildUp, we transform construction into an experience of trust, creativity, and innovation. We're not just another builder—we're your partner in crafting beautiful, custom homes that reflect your vision while staying within budget. Our modern approach combines thoughtful design, transparent pricing, and seamless execution to make your dream home a reality.

Building a home should be exciting, not stressful. That's why we've reimagined the entire construction process to put you first. From the moment you choose ZuildUp, you'll experience a level of transparency, quality, and care that sets us apart from traditional builders.
Every home comes with structural certification and comprehensive warranties up to 15 years
Fixed pricing with complete transparency on materials and costs—no hidden fees, ever
50+ professionals including architects, engineers, and construction specialists from top institutions
15+ active projects and 100+ completed homes across Delhi NCR with satisfied homeowners
The ZuildUp Process: Simple, Clear, Complete
We've perfected a streamlined approach that takes you from initial concept to move-in ready home with confidence and clarity at every stage.
We understand your vision, requirements & budget. Free site visit & feasibility analysis is a part of this step to kick start the project.
Our team of expert architects prepare a detailed plan & 3D views. Multiple design options are provided at this step to cater to your vision for your dream home.
Construction begins with strong foundation & structural work using premium grade materials as approved by you during the planning & designing phase.
MEP, Interiors, Flooring, Painting & Fixtures are completed as per the approved specifications ensuring full transparency and zero deviations.
Your completed home undergoes a rigorous quality inspection with more than 450+ checks before handover with all warranties & documentation provided.
Your investment deserves lasting protection. ZuildUp offers industry-leading warranties that cover both craftsmanship and materials, giving you complete peace of mind for years to come.
15 Years on structural integrity and upto 20 Years on window profiles
Upto 5  Years on wardrobes, modular kitchens, vanities, and internal doors
5 Year on seepage prevention and anti-termite solution
All third-party product warranties provided at handover
1 Year warranty on electrical wiring & everything else done by ZuildUp
Time matters. We commit to clear timelines and back them up with contractual guarantees, so you can plan your life around a completion date you can count on.
Timeline begins when approvals are received, plot is handed over, and all design decisions are finalized
5-slab home (Stilt + 4 floors) delivered in 13 months. Timeline adjusts by 1 month per slab variation
Built-in flexibility period accounts for unforeseen circumstances and ensures realistic expectations
If we miss our timeline beyond the buffer, we pay 0.25% of contract value per month—our commitment to you

Adjustments are made for legitimate factors like demolition requirements (45 days), construction bans, force majeure, or site-specific work restrictions. You'll receive regular forecasted dates, with firm pre-handover inspection notice given 7 days in advance.
The foundation of every great home is quality materials and expert engineering. At ZuildUp, we use only certified materials and follow rigorous construction standards that exceed building codes.
Slabs, Columns & Beams: M25 Ready Mix Concrete in the ratio 1:1:2 (Cement:Sand:Aggregate) providing comprehensive strength & superior quality control
Foundation: Site-mix with PPC cement from Ambuja/Dalmia achieving M25 strength
FE500 steel from Rathi, designed per earthquake norms and IS Code requirements
Premium quality red bricks ensuring strong structure
Interior: Cement plaster (12-15mm) + White Cement Putty for smooth finish
Water damage is preventable with the right approach. Our multi-layer waterproofing system provides redundant protection in all vulnerable areas, backed by rigorous testing before handover.
Level 1: Crystalline compound mixed into concrete that swells to seal micro-pores when water is encountered

Level 2: RCC (Reinforced Cement Concrete) walls for beam are robust, structural, or non-structural elements composed of concrete reinforced with steel bars to withstand heavy compressive and tensile loads.
Level 3 : Guniting Waterproofing on RCC Wall using dry mix shotcrete technique & then 4’6” brick work with Seamless cement plaster
Level 1: Waterproof concrete slab with waterproofing chemical mixed into the concrete.
Level 2: Surface coating on slab and 2ft up parapet walls
Testing: 24-hour standing water flood test on entire terrace
Level 1: Concrete toe walls form watertight bowl with sealed joints
Testing: 24-hour water retention test in each space

We use premium brands including Sika, Penetron, Kryton, and Pidilite, with application following manufacturer specifications. Additional protection includes waterproofing chemicals in external plaster and plumbing sleeves cast directly into concrete for watertight pipe bonds.
Smart Electrical Design for Modern Living

Your home's electrical system is designed for safety, convenience, and future flexibility. From proper circuit distribution to comprehensive automation provisioning, every detail is planned for your lifestyle.
Proper Wire Sizing: 10 sq mm main panels, 4 sq mm power/AC circuits, 1.5 sq mm lighting—no overloading
Safety First: Individual ELCB per phase, appropriately rated MCBs, thimble connections for reliability
Load Balancing: Three-phase distribution optimized for lights, fans, ACs, and appliances
Premium Components: Fire-retardant copper wires from Kalinga, ISI-rated heavy conduits
Wi-Fi router provisions per unit with pre-laid conduits
Smart TV provisions at 6A socket points

Every room is thoughtfully planned with switches, sockets, and lighting provisions based on furniture layout and usage patterns. From bedside controls to kitchen appliance circuits, your electrical system anticipates your needs.
Beautiful Finishes That Reflect Your Style
The details make the difference. From expansive windows to custom cabinetry, premium fixtures to sophisticated lighting, every finish is selected for quality, aesthetics, and durability.
2 track UPVC windows from premium Indian brands – Greentech, with up to 20-year warranty.
Modular kitchen worth INR 1,00,000 made with HDHMR board with laminates finish. Channels & hinges from any Indian brand. Thoughtful internal design with drawers and smart corner solutions.
Vitrified anti-skid tiles, Seamless installation, Polished granite on stairs and counter-top in Kitchen.
Lumens-based planning for comfortable reading throughout. Philips LED downlighters in ceilings, warm LED strips in coves. Provisions for wall lights and chandeliers. Facade lighting as per design.
Parryware/Hindware bathroom fittings with concealed systems. Wall-hung WCs, rain showers, designer basins.
Tractor Emulsion Finish for interiors & weather-proof paint finish for open areas.
Ready to Build Your Dream Home?
Join the growing community of homeowners who chose ZuildUp for their custom home construction. Experience the difference of working with a partner who values transparency, quality, and your vision.
Transform your plot into the home you've always imagined. With ZuildUp, you don't just build - you Zuild.

Provision for invertor will be done as per the plan.
Structural Design Shall be Earth Quake Resistant.
Framed Structures with properly designed Columns and beams as per structural engineer’s/architect’s drawing.
Water curing will be done 2 times a day.
All Sunken Area Water Proofing using Dr.Fixit/Sika
The mixing of Cement, aggregate and dust aggregate(rori) shall be done with concrete mixers. On Site mixing shall be used for casting Columns (M-25), i.e., (1:1:2)
The use of Vibrators shall be made to consolidate the layers properly in footings, columns, Beams & roof slabs.
Cement Mortar for 9’’ brickwork shall not be leaner (1:6) and for 4½’’ brickwork cement mortar shall not be leaner than 1:4.
